description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and featuring a driveway with a parked car. The front facade is characterized by large glass windows and a combination of light-colored and wooden exterior panels. The property includes a spacious outdoor patio area with seating and a dining table, as well as a small garden and green spaces. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms such as bedrooms and bathrooms. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private backyard, partially enclosed by hedges for privacy. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a driveway, patio, and garden. The design highlights open-plan living and strong indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the bungalow with the driveway, parked car, main entrance, and a glimpse into the open-plan living area.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side and backyard, showcasing the outdoor patio, garden, and large windows along the facade.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear and side of the bungalow, focusing on the backyard, patio area, and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side of the bungalow, emphasizing the long row of windows and the driveway leading to the garage area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
